name: copper-pp-mcp
description: The Copper CRM command line no one else built: full CRUD plus a local database, weighted pipeline forecasting, stale-deal detection, and the bulk operations Copper's own API refuses to provide.

copper_api_key.title: COPPER_API_KEY
copper_api_key.description: Sets COPPER_API_KEY for the Copper MCP server.

copper_user_email.title: COPPER_USER_EMAIL
copper_user_email.description: Your Copper account email address. Required — Copper's API sends this as X-PW-UserEmail on every request; omitting it yields 401/403 errors.
